steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: Count the relevant faces, dimensions, or scale factor before setting up equations. Lengths scale by $k$, areas by $k^2$, and volumes by $k^3$; for boxes and prisms, write the needed face or volume formula directly.

steps.title: Identify the linear scale factor
steps.content: Square A has side lengths that are 88 times those of square B. The linear scale factor is 88.

steps.title: Apply the area scaling rule
steps.content:
Using the relationship between linear and area scale factors:
$$k = 88^2 = 7744$$
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
